Race-Gnome — Male Gnome Fighter
Strength: 11 (+0) Dexterity: 16 (+3) Constitution: 12 (+1) Intelligence: 8 (-1) Wisdom: 11 (+0) Charisma: 12 (+1)
Background: Deserter Heroic Path: None Alignment: Chaotic Neutral
Experience: 117/300 Level: 1 Size: Small Speed: 25 Carry/Lift: 165/330
Ability Notes: Gnome Ability Adjustment: +2 Intelligence/+1 Charisma
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +2
Feat Count: General: 0 Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Fighting Style)
Gnome Features: Darkvision; Gnome Ability Adjustment; Gnome Skills; Gnomish Cunning; Riverfolk Fighter Features: Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Fighting Style (Two-Weapon Fighting); Fighting Style; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Perception, Survival); Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Deserter Features: Old Veteran; Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Perception); Weapon Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Martial)
Feature Notes:
Fighting Style: 1 selection
Darkvision: R60' Sees one light level better
Old Veteran: Knows how to infiltrate military organizations

Acrobatics: (dex) +3 Insight: (wis) +2 Performance: (cha) +1

Skill Proficiency: Athletics; History; Insight; Intimidation; Perception; Persuasion
Tool Proficiency: Mason's Tools; Water Vehicles
Languages: Erenlander; Orcish; Shadow Tongue; Trader's Tongue
Skill Notes:
Gnome Skills: Language (Erenlander; Trader's Tongue; Choose 2 from any)
Riverfolk: Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Insight; Persuasion)/Tool Proficiency (Water Vehicles)
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Combat
Hit Points: 7 Initiative: +3 Armor Class: 19
Armor Proficiency: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons; Whip
Armor: Splint Shield: Shield Weapons: Flail (+2 1d8 B); Morningstar (+2 1d8 P); Shortsword (+5 1d6+3 P); Unarmed Strike (+2 1 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +3
Fighting Style (Two-Weapon Fighting): Adds the ability modifier to the damage from a second weapon attack
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+1 hit points once per short rest
Small: Has disadvantage on attacks with heavy weapons
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: +1; Constitution: +3; Dexterity: +3; Intelligence: -1; Strength: +2; Wisdom: +0
Save Notes: Gnomish Cunning: Has advantage on Charisma, Intelligence, and Wisdom saves vs. magic
